mapper.select: select admin_role_id as adminRoleId, user_id as userId, role_name as roleName from admin_role where user_id = #{userId}

select u.user_id AS userId, u.email, u.password, u.name, u.role, u.phone, u.created_at AS createdAt, ar.admin_role_id AS adminRoleId, ar.role_name AS roleName from user u join admin_role ar on u.user_id = ar.user_id where u.active = true
mapper.insert: insert into user(email, password, name, role, phone) values(#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, "ADMIN", #{phone})
